title: Termux MCP Edge physical qualification envelope v1
description: A compact, path-free dispatch envelope for a release-eligible validator-v11 report and its raw harness-v11 evidence. workflowFullSuiteSha256 identifies the workflow-built full-suite artifact, while nativeFullSuiteSha256 identifies the independently built physical-device artifact. They are separate provenance facts; byte equality is neither required nor asserted.

validatorReportSha256.description: SHA-256 of the exact unchanged release-validator-v11.json file dispatched beside this envelope.

rawHarnessReportSha256.description: SHA-256 of the exact private raw harness-v11 report. The raw report is intentionally excluded from the dispatch bundle.

workflowFullSuiteSha256.description: SHA-256 of the workflow-built full-suite artifact recorded by validator v11. This is independent of nativeFullSuiteSha256; equality is not required or asserted.

nativeFullSuiteSha256.description: SHA-256 of the full-suite artifact built and executed natively by harness v11. This is independent of workflowFullSuiteSha256; equality is not required or asserted.
